prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UV-SPYPEN-MARKER-CHILD-PINK-10PK-FBA Product Type: MARKING_PEN Brand (from catalog): ASR Federal Existing Title: ASR Federal 10- Pack UV Security Highlighter Tracking Ink Pen Permanent Marker, Pink Description: If neither digital or regular written communication are a viable or safe form of communication available to you, or you just want to try writing with an invisible ink pen, look no further than the ASR Federal Security Spy UV Invisible Ink Permanent Marker Pens. The spy pens can write invisibly on almost any dry surface, including metal, wood, plastic, paper, glass, paint, skin, clothing and even currency.

If digital or regular written communication are not a viable form of communication available, look no further than these UV invisible ink permanent marker pens. The invisible ink pens are ideal for making and communicating sensitive information, marking personal property or monitoring theft detection. They will come in handy in all sorts of espionage or covert situations.

The ASR Federal Security Spy UV Invisible Ink Permanent Marker Pens are waterproof, heat-proof and non-toxic and when written with, can only be revealed when illuminated by a UV light or black light source.

Lastly, the invisible ink pens are also a fun activity for kids. They'll love the playing with the invisible ink to share secret messages and are sure to conjure up some fun pretend play adventures between siblings and friends. Safe and harmless, the spy pens are nontoxic, waterproof, heatproof and can mark over 2500 feet in length.

These invisible ink pens are excellent tools for local and federal governments alike, as the markings will remain invisible until illuminated under a UV light. Election certified invisible ink pens and markers are suitable for voting stations, ballot boxes and other election related events. Search Terms: (none) Features: (none) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
